images.title: 00 3626 Carrelet (pêche au) - Frankreich.jpg
images.description: Method of inshore fishing on the French Atlantic coast: Fishing with nets that are lowered to the seabed by means of winches from a jetty that extends into the sea and are pulled up again to harvest the catch. In principle, the fish that are caught between the net on the bottom and the surface are caught. On the jetty there are mostly small shelters and huts.

images.title: 00 3627 Île Madame Frankreich.jpg
images.description: Île Madame, a French tidal island on the west coast of the Atlantic Ocean. The island can be reached on foot at low tide via the "Passe aux bœufs" reachable. On the island is the Ford de l'Île Madame.
